positive: Central symmetrical composition featuring highly stylized bioluminescent flora and mythical forest fauna. Deep jewel tones of emerald, sapphire, and amethyst dominate, accented by glowing neon highlights. The style should blend Art Nouveau curves with clean, modern geometric detailing, creating strong, high-contrast silhouettes. The illustration must look like a seamless, ornamental pattern element suitable for fabric printing, rendered with extreme detail, digital ink effect, clean lines, isolated on a solid dark contrasting background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, lowres, noise, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, crop, gradient fade
